summary: Vertical video. A re-posted talking-head clip of Cudahy, CA Vice Mayor Cynthia Gonzalez speaking to camera, with auto-generated word-by-word caption overlays ('ARE ALL ABOUT TERRITORY', 'UP IN YOUR', 'HELPING OUT'). It is a single-camera social clip with no music, narration track, or added editing.
notable_text: Burned-in auto-captions: 'ARE ALL ABOUT TERRITORY', 'UP IN YOUR', 'HELPING OUT'. Tweet condemns the Vice Mayor for allegedly calling on gangs to attack ICE officers.
